summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, evaluate bidders, generate explainable reports, flag uncertain cases for human review, and improve over time through a feedback loop.
key_steps: Extract structured eligibility criteria from tender documents
Parse and understand multi-format bidder submissions
Evaluate each bidder against all the required criterion
Generate explainable, auditable, and consistent decisions and reasoning
Flag uncertain cases for human review
Improve overall evaluation through a feedback loop
optimization_claims: The system can handle moderate customization with transformer-based NLP models and OCR engines.
Components can be independently developed, tested, and scaled.
constraints_addressed: Handles real-world government workflows where accuracy and auditability are critical
